query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_players,
  SUM(CASE WHEN totalPuzzles > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_players,
  SUM(totalPuzzles) as total_puzzles,
  SUM(completedCycles) as total_cycles
FROM players;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_players,
  SUM(CASE WHEN totalPuzzles > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_players,
  SUM(totalPuzzles) as total_puzzles,
  SUM(completedCycles) as total_cycles
FROM players;
